name: Walnut-Grapefruit Salad with Yellow Chilies
recipeIngredient: 4 Yellow wax hot chilies, sliced in thin rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the membranes from the grapefruit and oranges.
2. Dice the jicama into a bowl.
3. Slice the yellow wax chilies into thin rings.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the chopped walnuts (if using), olive oil, balsamic vinegar, fresh lime juice, chopped parsley, and sugar.
5. Toss the fruit sections with the dressing until well coated.
6. Add the jicama and sliced chilies to the salad and toss again to coat evenly.
7. Cover the bowl and let the salad stand at room temperature for 1 hour. The salad can be prepared ahead of time and refrigerated overnight.
8. Just before serving, sprinkle the chopped walnuts over the top of the salad.
(144 CALORIES PER SERVING: 3 G PROTEIN, 4 G FAT, 29 G CARBO- HYDRATE; 5 MG SODIUM; 0 MG CHOLESTEROL.)
